title: RAMC: Risk-Aware Model-then-Control for Predictive Thermal Control of Buildings
description: Code and synthetic data accompanying the article "Risk-Aware Model Training for Predictive Thermal Control of Buildings", submitted to Buildings (MDPI). RAMC augments conventional prediction loss with a conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) penalty on operational costs under perturbed inputs, embedding tail-risk awareness directly into the prediction model used by a nonlinear model predictive controller.
